sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70865" key="ni/nnh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νίννη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, perh. <sense id="n70865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grandmother</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mother-in-law,</tr_> Demitsas <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μακεδ.</foreign> No.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg003.perseus-grc1:416" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">416</biblScope> </bibl> (Thessalonica, <date TEIform="date">ii A.D.</date>); also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νίνη</orth> ib.No.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg003.perseus-grc1:415" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">415</biblScope> </bibl> (ibid.); cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νέννος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
